ingredients_text: Chicken Breast (39%), Basmati Rice (30%), Tomato (14%), Green Peas (7%), Low Fat Cream (4.5%) (conatins Milk), Herbs & Spices (3%) (Ginger, Cardamom, Cumin, Coriander, Mace, Cinnamon, Black Pepper, Clove Ground, Fenugreek Leaves, Bay Leaf, Saffron, Star Anise) Napoli Sauce (1.5%), Cashews (1%) (Tree Nuts), Onion (1%), Brown Sugar (<1%), Garlic (<1%), Olive Oil (<1%), Almonds (<1%) (Tree Nuts), Tandoori Colour (<1%). Allergen Advice Contains: Milk, Tree Nuts. May be present: Gluten, Peanuts, Sesame, Egg, Fish, Crustaceans, Soy, Lupin and Sulphites.
